content.en:
"The realm of the Dao above the Extreme Extreme Dao!"

Ye Tian gasped, the value of this Daokong True Tree branch was too high, no wonder the Qinglong Dao Ancestor was unwilling to hand it over!

After all, if the Qinglong Dao Ancestor couldn't recover his strength on his own, maybe he could use this Dao Kong True Tree to trade with those incomparably powerful Sixfold Peak Ancestors in the future, so as to exchange for treasures to restore his strength!

It's also a hope!

But now, the branches of this Daokong True Tree have returned to the sky.

"Disciple, what is the Dao realm above the Extreme Extreme Dao called?" Ye Tian asked with some curiosity.

"Master, that realm is called the Yuan Dao, and the Ten Thousand Daos Return to the Yuan Dao, which is for the Yuan Dao! The Yuan Dao is strong and weak, and it has something to do with the extreme extreme path that you have comprehended, if there are only nine kinds of extreme extreme ways to comprehend, even if you comprehend the Yuan Dao, you can only comprehend one Yuan Dao. If one comprehends the eighteen extreme paths, one can hope to comprehend the twofold one, if one has comprehended the thirty-six extremes, one can hope to comprehend the threefold one, if one has comprehended the seventy-two extremes, one can hope to comprehend the fourfold one, if one comprehends one hundred and eight extreme paths, one can hope to comprehend the fivefold one, if one comprehends one hundred and eighty-one extreme paths, one has the hope of comprehending the sixfold one, if one comprehends the two hundred and fifty or sixty extreme paths, one has the hope of comprehending the sevenfold one, if one comprehends the three hundred and twelve extreme extremes, one has the hope of comprehending the eightfold one, and only has three hundred and sixty-five extreme paths, there is hope to comprehend the Ninefold Yuan Dao!"

"Every time the comprehension of the Yuan Dao is one step shorter, there is a big gap in strength. In particular, the Ninefold Yuan Dao, also known as the Supreme Yuan Dao, far crushes the Eightfold Yuan Dao!"

Han Xuan introduced it like this, and Ye Tian understood.

If you want to become a half-step sevenfold ancestor, you must comprehend the Yuan Dao, no matter which Yuan Dao it is.

But Ye Tian knew very well that it must be very difficult to comprehend the Yuan Dao.

......

In addition to the branches of the Daokong True Tree, the Qinglong Dao Ancestor also had a large amount of resources, which were the resources that were collected by the other half-step Sixfold Ancestors of the Qinglong Dao Palace and the other places he had gone to.

These resources were too many, many times more than any of the resources Ye Tian had obtained in the past, enough for Ye Tian to cultivate for a long time.

As a result, he doesn't need to worry about resources now.

"Apprentice, I'll take you back to the Upper Spirit Domain!"

Soon, Ye Tian came back and arranged for Han Xuan to enter the Void Tooth Holy Gate to cultivate.

However, after Han Xuan entered the Void Tooth Holy Gate, he had been cultivating penance and had no contact with other fellow sects.

Therefore, many original ancestors did not know that the Void Tooth Holy Gate had Han Xuan, the triple ancestor.

Time flies, and before you know it, the era of the Million Origin Domain has passed.

In this era of the Million Origin Domain, Ye Tian did his best to help Han Xuan comprehend the Extreme Dao, and many resources were supplied one by one, plus his own continuous guidance.

Therefore, Han Xuan finally comprehended some extreme paths.

Now, the number of extreme extreme paths she has comprehended has reached three hundred and six, but at this point, it is extremely difficult for her to comprehend another extreme extreme path.

Even if it was Ye Tian, the help he gave was limited.

Of course, if Han Xuan used the endless years to slowly comprehend, he still had the hope of comprehending the three hundred and sixty-five extreme paths.

Compared with Han Xuan's progress, Ye Tian's progress is great!

Now.

He had already fused three hundred and sixty-four will clones, and only the last one was left, and he could completely fuse the entire Will Pagoda.

"Let's get started!"

Ye Tian didn't need to slash the Will Pagoda anymore, after all, there was only the last layer of the Will Pagoda left, so he could directly condense into a Will Clone, and then start to fuse.

Soon, the will clone was successfully condensed.

Then, it's time for the fusion process!

Fusion failed!

Fusion failed!

Fusion failed!

......

Ye Tian didn't feel strange about these failures, if it was a one-time success, it would be strange!

Ten times!

Twenty times!

Thirty times!

He had failed ninety-nine times, and finally on the hundredth time, Ye Tian had successfully fused the three hundred and sixty-fifth will clones.

And he is equivalent to copying the body a hundred times, consuming a lot of resources.

Fortunately, he succeeded in the end!

"Three hundred and sixty-five will clones, all of them have been successfully fused, and my current strength is much stronger than before!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

At this moment, he also has no Will Pagoda, but it can be said that his entire body is the Will Pagoda, and his defense is extremely powerful.

Now that he has reached this point, he is very close to the Sixfold Ancestor, but he can't impact the Sixfold Ancestor.

If you want to impact the Sixfold Primordial Ancestor, you have to meet one condition, that is, to condense the Dao Heart with the Extreme Extreme Dao and condense it successfully, so that you are eligible to condense the Dao Fruit and achieve the Sixfold Primordial Ancestor!

And condensing the Dao heart is not simple, you need to find something to bear.

What is a carry?

It is an item that carries the extreme path, so as to turn into a Dao heart, and then turn into a Dao fruit from above the Dao heart.

In other words, the quality of the carried thing is related to the quality of the Dao fruit.

Dao Fruits are also divided into one and two, and so on, like Ye Tian can completely condense the Ninefold Dao Fruit, and some of the carrying things also contain special effects.

If Ye Tian chose an ordinary carrying object, he would not be able to break through perfectly, and his hope of comprehending the Ninefold Yuan Dao in the future would be greatly reduced.

Therefore, the carrying object must be well chosen.

The other half-step Sixfold Primordial Ancestors didn't care about anything they carried, and it was good if they could help them break through, after all, their goal was only the Sixfold Primordial Ancestor.

But Ye Tian cares about what he carries, so he has to look for it.

Subsequently, he searched for a long time in the Upper Spirit Origin Domain and found several carrying objects, but the best one could only condense the Sevenfold Dao Fruit, which did not meet his requirements.

this day.

Ye Tian was going to visit a Dao Ancestor and ask for information about the things he carried, after all, he relied on himself to find it, and he didn't know how many years it would take, and he might not even be able to find it.

"Which Dao Ancestor are you visiting?"

Ye Tian thought about it.

It seems that he has met Changbai Daozu, but the relationship between the two does not seem to be very good.

With Changbai Daozu's temperament, he will definitely not give him serious advice, so he still has to consult a Dao Ancestor with a good temperament.

Soon, he had a goal.

"Void White Dao Ancestor!"

This Dao Ancestor was very kind, so he was going to visit this Dao Ancestor.
